summary: Crisp soundboard recording of the legendary July 16 1970 “Euphoria Ballroom” show, highlighted by Janis Joplin’s unforgettable Lovelight and Candyman moments.
review: The Charlie Miller transfer delivers a crystal‑clear soundboard capture that lets listeners hear every nuance of the night, from Jerry’s cheeky pre‑Lovelight banter to Ron’s gritty growl.  The performance shines thanks to Janis Joplin’s surprise guest appearance on Lovelight and Candyman, making this show a fan‑favorite historic snapshot.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently enthusiastic reviews praise both the exceptional live performance (guest Janis Joplin, standout Lovelight/Candyman) and the high‑quality, crisp soundboard transfer.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Transfer by Charlie Miller praised as crystal clear and crisp; reviewers note no audible flaws or noise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A high‑energy set capped by an iconic guest appearance; the surprise Janis Joplin jam on Lovelight flows seamlessly into a soaring Candyman, creating a memorable climax.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Stage banter before Lovelight ('Aw Fuck!') is highlighted, showing his playful presence.
band_member_comments.Drums: Ron 'growls' on the mic during the jam, noted as a vivid moment.
